stemHtml: A pilot has begun taxiing for departure on runway 32. It is around midnight and snow is worsening conditions. Although runway 32 is the noise-abatement preference, runway 24 is longer and offers a greater safety margin. The pilot requests ATC clearance for runway 24. What response should the pilot expect?

options.a: Clearance for runway 24, as safety takes priority over noise abatement.
options.b: Clearance for runway 32, since ATC has sole authority over runway selection.
options.c: Clearance for runway 32, with an instruction to use maximum available thrust.
options.d: Clearance for runway 24, but ATC will be required to file an incident report.
